name: pixel-transition
title: Pixel Transition
description: react-bits PixelTransition minus react and gsap: two stacked content layers swap under a random-order pixel flash on hover/tap/focus. The gsap stagger is rebuilt as per-pixel random delay custom properties baked at build time driving zero-length steps(1) CSS animations; the layer swap is a delayed visibility transition. pixelColor takes any CSS color including tokens.
